description: Capture guarded screenshots and PDFs of public web pages with hosted Chromium, inline MCP artifacts, render diagnostics, and successful-render quota reporting.

notes: Send the Latchshot API key as Authorization: Bearer <LATCHSHOT_API_KEY>.
The email-only Free plan renews to 100 successful renders each UTC calendar month.

clients: MCP clients with Streamable HTTP and custom-header support

notes: The official MCP TypeScript SDK completed initialize, tools/list, get_usage, and a live inline PNG capture against production.
